createdAt.description: Server timestamp when user was created.

Project.title: Video Analysis Project
Project.description: A project containing video annotations, events, and tags.

data.description: JSON string stringified project data containing shapes, freezeFrames, playlists, tags, tagEvents, etc. Or it could be broken down.

/projects/{projectId}.description: Projects collection, containing the full state of the project as a stringified JSON in 'data' field to fit within document limits, since shapes and paths can be complex.
